description: Built-in well-known shapes. Each preset is a sequence of place instructions starting from a single piece at the origin. targetPiece is the index in the placement order (0 = the initial piece). Faces: 0=Left, 1=LowerLeftFront, 2=UpperFront, 3=UpperBack, 4=LowerLeftBack, 5=Bottom, 6=LowerRightFront, 7=LowerRightBack, 8=Right.

presets.name: Square Pair
presets.description: Two modules joined on their right square faces (mirrored).

presets.name: Bottom Stack
presets.description: Two modules joined on their bottom square faces.

presets.name: Kite Pair (Front)
presets.description: Two modules joined on Upper Front kite faces.

presets.name: Triple Row
presets.description: Three modules in a row, joined on Left↔Right square faces.

presets.name: L-Shape
presets.description: Three modules forming an L on the ground.

presets.name: Wall of 6
presets.description: Six modules in a single row, joined Left↔Right — long living-room wall.

presets.name: Wall of 8
presets.description: Eight modules in a row — long hall or barn-style structure.

presets.name: Wall of 10
presets.description: Ten modules in a row — extra-long bunkhouse or workshop wall.

presets.name: Triplex (6)
presets.description: Three side-by-side two-storey units — classic triplex.

presets.name: Cathedral Row (6)
presets.description: Three modules in a row with three more peaked on top via Upper-Front kites — chapel/cathedral silhouette.

presets.name: Greenhouse Row (8)
presets.description: Four-module ground floor with peaked Upper-Front and Upper-Back kite roofs — long-span glasshouse.

presets.name: Bungalow Plus (6)
presets.description: Five modules wide, single floor, with one stacked over the centre as a loft.

presets.name: Courtyard Home (8)
presets.description: Two parallel walls of three with a connecting roof piece on each end — open central courtyard.

presets.name: L-Wing Home (5)
presets.description: Three-module main wing with a perpendicular two-module wing branching off the bottom — classic L-plan.

presets.name: Barracks (12)
presets.description: Six-module row × two storeys — standard troop barracks for a squad of 12 bunks.

presets.name: Long Barracks (16)
presets.description: Eight-module row × two storeys — full platoon barracks block.

presets.name: Hangar (12)
presets.description: Six-module ground floor with peaked Upper-Front kite roofs along the length — aircraft / vehicle hangar.

presets.name: Victorian Home (10)
presets.description: Five modules wide × two storeys — Victorian-style family residence with substantial footprint.

presets.name: Fortified Wall (14)
presets.description: Seven-module curtain wall with seven peaked battlement modules cresting the top — castle-style rampart.

presets.name: Fortress Keep (20)
presets.description: Five-module wall × four storeys — massive square keep, the heart of a castle complex.

presets.name: Mess Hall (10)
presets.description: Five-module ground floor with five Upper-Back kite roof modules — long open mess hall with sloped roof.

presets.name: Forward Operating Base (18)
presets.description: Six-module barrack row with twin three-storey watchtowers at the ends and three centred command modules above.

presets.name: Quonset Hut Row (12)
presets.description: Six-module ground floor with twin Upper-Front and Upper-Back peaked roofs — long arched supply hut.

presets.name: Couples Pod (2)
presets.description: Two modules joined Left↔Right — main room and a separate sleeping module.

presets.name: Tiny A-Frame (3)
presets.description: Single base module with twin Upper-Front and Upper-Back kite peaks — classic A-frame silhouette.

presets.name: Cottage (3)
presets.description: Two-module ground floor with a single Upper-Front peak roof — quintessential cottage.

presets.name: Saltbox Cottage (4)
presets.description: Two-module ground floor with two Upper-Front peak roofs — double-pitched saltbox profile.

presets.name: Storybook Cottage (5)
presets.description: Two-module ground with peaks on both Upper-Front and Upper-Back of one side — asymmetric storybook silhouette.

presets.name: Stone Cottage (5)
presets.description: Three-module ground floor with two stacked above one end — heavy-set stone-built look.

presets.name: Country Cottage (4)
presets.description: Three modules wide with a single peaked dormer in the middle.

presets.name: Log Cabin (4)
presets.description: Four modules in a row — classic log-cabin floorplan along a single ridge line.

presets.name: Lake Cabin (5)
presets.description: Three-module ground floor with a centered loft module above — gabled lakeside retreat.

presets.name: Ski Chalet (6)
presets.description: Two-module ground × two-storey with twin peaked roofs — alpine chalet with steep pitched roof.

presets.name: Family Bungalow (5)
presets.description: Five modules in a single row — roomy single-storey family bungalow.

presets.name: Suburban Home (7)
presets.description: Three-module ground floor with three stacked above and a peaked attic in the centre.

presets.name: Colonial Home (8)
presets.description: Four-module ground floor × two storeys — symmetrical Colonial-style house.

presets.name: Farmhouse (9)
presets.description: Five-module ground floor with four-module upper storey — substantial rural farmhouse.

presets.name: Ranch House (6)
presets.description: Five-module ground floor with one stacked module forming a single bedroom suite above.

presets.name: Tudor Home (8)
presets.description: Three-wide × two-storey home with three peaked dormers across the front — classic Tudor.

presets.name: Mansion (15)
presets.description: Five-wide × three-storey grand mansion — substantial multi-family residence.

presets.name: Duplex (4)

presets.name: Co-Housing Cluster (10)

presets.name: Eco Village (16)
